entry.title: Set Custom Response Headers in Cloud Foundry Environment
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For context, we have an ABAP Environment Service running on the Cloud Foundry environment. Within this Service, we have deployed multiple of our own custom applications. These applications were built and are being developed using SAP BAS.

We'd like to set some custom response headers to any request coming to our service.

So far, we have tried setting them on one of our custom apps using

<meta http-equiv [...]>

and also by adding a xs-app.json file in the same folder as our manifest.json file, adding only the following option, as detailed here:

{ "responseHeaders" : [
    {"name": "header1", "value": "value1"},
    {"name": "header2", "value": "value2"}
  ]
}

But this didn't have the desired effect app-wide, let alone instance-wide.

Our question is how exactly do we set custom response headers? Preferably instance-wide, but at the very least app-wide. Is the only solution using an unmanaged application router? And if so, what are the steps we should take bearing in mind that up until now we defined our routing in each custom app's manifest.json file?

entry.title: Re: REBV condition type showing negative value even after...
entry.content: Hi Dequan, This is not for reporting purpose, this is for settlement to the customer. This issue is observed when credit memo is created using WB2R_SC.

entry.title: Joule in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile: Getting Things Done with AI on the
entry.content:
With the 1H 2025 SAP SuccessFactors release, our AI copilot Joule is now available in the SAP SuccessFactors mobile app - offering a more accessible, efficient way for employees and managers to complete everyday HR tasks, no matter where they are.

A More Natural Mobile Experience

Whether you’re a manager reviewing team updates or an employee checking on a request, Joule in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile is designed to meet you in the flow of work.

 

  • Managers can:
    • Review and approve time-off or kick off bonus payments
    • Access compensation insights about the team
    • Give feedback and check goal progress with just a few taps

 

  • Employees can:
    • Find answers to HR questions (e.g. “What’s this on my pay slip?”)
    • Track learning progress and view benefits without navigating deep menus
    • Use Siri voice commands to open the app and launch Joule hands-free

It’s a simpler, more intuitive way to get work done - anytime, from anywhere.

 

 

 

Smarter, Faster Support

Joule brings the same intelligent support experience from desktop to mobile. Using advanced AI and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), it pulls answers from trusted sources like company policies, help documents, and HR systems.

Whether you're an employee needing clarity or a manager making decisions, Joule enables:

  • Up to 90% faster task execution
  • Up to 95% faster access to information

This reduces delays and allows everyone to stay focused on what matters.

Designed for Flexibility and Self-Sufficiency

From guiding users through tasks to offering step-by-step instructions, Joule helps reduce confusion and encourages confidence in handling HR processes independently.

  • Managers save time by skipping manual steps and gaining quick access to the right information
  • Employees feel more in control with answers and actions readily available - without waiting on support

With Siri voice integration, users can launch Joule without unlocking their phone, adding another layer of speed and accessibility.

 

Joule in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile is now live with the 1H 2025 release. Simply update your app to start exploring how AI can help you work smarter - whether you’re managing a team or managing your day.

Where to find more information:

  • Check out all available use cases 
  • Setting Up Joule in SAP SuccessFactors
  • Joule Monthly Release Update
  • View documentation to help you get started
  • Getting started with SAP SuccessFactors
  • SAP SuccessFactors community

entry.title: Re: WITH HINT is highly needed in SAP CAP
entry.content: Hi @johannesvogel the setting in the package json would affect the engine selection. this can be configured in s4, see note https://me.sap.com/notes/2570371#L5. I would like to have individual hints for a view, why should I build a separate handler for it if it could also be annotated in the view. Analogous to the cds views in s4.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding Custom Task Permission Issue
entry.content:
Thanks Noemi for your inputs. Permission issue is fixed now.

I got another query related to custom task which I created. I am looking for an option to create this custom task based on certain condition like after completion of task Provide Personal Data by candidate only. As of now task is created at first step and is assigned to HR Admin. Do you see is it possible to put such conditions.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News June 2025
entry.content: @marbeth_chavezw Thank you for good insights on new features available for  SAP Cloud ALM.

entry.title: How to maintain Credit Analyst?
entry.content:
Credit Analyst has to be maintained in order to fill this field in Documented Credit Decision (DCD).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain Credit Analyst?
entry.content:
Maintain the BP relationship TUKMSB0

  1. Use App Maintain Business Partner.
  2. The Credit Analyst has to be maintained under button Relationships, with Relationship Category 'TUKMSB0' - 'in Credit Management is managed by' to the partner.
  3. The Credit Analyst must exist in the role "Employee" in the system

Help Portal Document:- Business Partner Relationships

entry.title: Celebrate Your Team: Setting Up Work Anniversary Alerts in SAP SuccessFactors, Made Easy!
entry.content:
Making your employees feel appreciated is a big part of creating a great workplace. One simple yet powerful way to do this is by recognizing their work anniversaries – celebrating how long they've been a valuable part of your team. While manually tracking and remembering these dates can be an administrative burden, SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central offers robust capabilities to automate this process.

This guide will provide a detailed, step-by-step approach to configuring automatic "work anniversary alerts" within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. We will explore how to leverage standard functionalities to create efficient and automated notifications, ensuring no employee milestone goes unnoticed. This proactive recognition strategy significantly enhances overall employee engagement and retention.

Let's make celebrating the teams easy and automatic!

Step 1: Provisioning Switches

Before we start building, we need to make sure your SAP SuccessFactors system has the right switches turned on in the background. 

Validate settings below are enabled in Provisioning (Company Settings):

  • SAP Best Practices Upgrades in Upgrade Center
  • Employee Central V2 features: Generic Objects, Effective Dated Data Platform, Employee Profile Data Audit, Attachment Manager
  • Employee Central Foundation Objects

Step 2 - Assign Permissions

To successfully implement and manage these configurations, ensure your user ID is granted the appropriate role-based permissions. We will need permissions to:

  • Manage Upgrade Center, Provisioning, Foundation Objects, and Business Configuration.
  • Import/Export data, manage Workflows, manage Picklists, and manage User Roles.
  • Specifically, confirm permissions for "Off-Cycle Event Batch" and "EC Alerts and Notifications" management.

Step 3 - Activate Best Practices Content

  • Navigate to Admin Center → Upgrade Center.
  • Filter by SAP Best Practices, find “Employee Central Anniversary Alerts”
  • Click Learn More & Upgrade Now, confirm, and track background job execution.

 

Step 4 - Monitor Activation Status

After triggering the upgrade, it's crucial to monitor its completion.

  • Monitor background jobs triggered by the activation.
  • Look out for the email titled “Best Practice Configurations Employee Central Anniversary Alerts COMPLETED” with detailed status logs.

 

Step 5 - System Configuration

This step involves configuring a custom field to store anniversary data and setting up critical background jobs.

Custom Field Setup:

  • Enable/validate custom field in Business Configuration
    Go to Manage Business Configuration → employmentInfo → add custom-long10 (Number of Years) → Save
  • Set role-based permissions for the new field (custom-long10) to the relevant admin roles

Scheduling Background Jobs:

Access Provisioning (or Manage Scheduled Jobs in Admin Center):

  • Create an Off‑Cycle Event Batch Processing Job set to run daily
  • Create EC Alerts and Notification Job, also daily, after the above job

It's vital to maintain this exact sequence. The BizX Off-Cycle Event Processing job must always complete before the EC Alerts & Notification job begins. If automating these daily, ensure this order is strictly preserved.

Job Owner Permissions: The job owner for these scheduled jobs must have edit access to write to the "Number of Years" field (custom-long10).

Step 6: Validating Off-Cycle Event Batch Configuration

The activation process creates a core object for handling anniversary calculations.

  • Navigate to Manage Data.
  • Locate the object Off Cycle Event Batch - SFCC_SERVICE_ANNIVERSARY.
  • Validate the information and update it as needed.
  • Confirm that the Associated Rule for calculating the "Number of Years" is correctly linked, update if required.
  • Ensure "Employment Details" is set as the Base Object within the Off Cycle Event Batch configuration.

 

  • Validate the Associated Rule to calculate the number of years under Manage Data - Off Cycle Event Batch -  Numberofyears. Use Employment Details as the Base Object in the Off-Cycle Event Batch Configuration.

 

Optional: Creating an Off-Cycle Event Batch User Group
You can create an Off Cycle Event Batch User Group and assign it under Manage Data - Off Cycle Event Batch.

Benefit: This group allows you to specify a subset of employees for batch processing, rather than processing the entire workforce if no filters are set. If no user group is assigned, the system will process every active employee record matching your batch filters (or all active employees if no filters are applied).

  • Create an Off Cycle Event Batch User Group and assign it under Manage Data - Off Cycle Event Batch. This is optional.

Step 7 - Set Up EC Alerts and Notifications

Create an alert workflow that specifies the recipient of the anniversary message (typically the employee , but can also include their manager, HR, etc.). This workflow will be assigned within the business rule.

Create Alert Messages for various anniversary years (e.g., 1-year, 5-year, 10-year). These messages will be sent to the employee. Ensure your messages are personalized and reflect your organization's recognition culture.

 

Create a business rule to trigger the work/service anniversary alert message based on the calculated "Number of Years."

Assign this business rule under Manage Business Configuration → employmentInfo → Trigger Rules.

Save your configurations.

By following these steps, you can establish a streamlined, automated system that recognizes and celebrates employee milestones, significantly enhancing engagement and retention. Leveraging SAP Best Practices ensures scalability across all employee populations and country localizations.

 

Error Handling & Re‑activation | Essential KBA References

  1. Verify Hire/Service Date sync.
    Ensure that the Hire Date (or Service Date) in Employee Central (EC) correctly syncs to the standard BizX Anniversary Date field. Misalignment here often causes anniversary alerts to fire on the wrong date— see 3171033 for details and resolution by performing a full HRIS export/import or sync.
  2. Validate the timing of the job, please ensure both the server date and today() should be the same date. It depends on your Data Center of your instance. 
  3. Handle Rehires & Service‑Date Calculation
    If employees are rehired, ensure your service anniversary logic accounts for breaks in employment and cumulative service time. Refer to KBA for guidance on calculating continuous service 2431354
  4. Resolve Off‑Cycle Event Batch issues.
    If active employees aren’t picked up by the Off‑Cycle Event Batch job (e.g., code SFCC_SERVICE_ANNIVERSARY), check your base object and filter settings. This is covered in 2945528 
  5. Troubleshoot job execution failures
    For scenarios where the Off‑Cycle Event Batch or EC Alerts & Notifications jobs run without generating alerts or emails, consult KBA  3519940, which covers workflow and email trigger failures (SAP login required.
  6. Ensure correct permissions and confirm the job owner and alert-triggering users have:
    Edit access to the "Number of Years" custom field (custom-long10), and Permissions to schedule, monitor, and execute Off‑Cycle Event Batch and EC Alerts jobs.

 

Conclusion

Setting up automatic work-anniversary alerts in Employee Central isn’t just a technical achievement—it's a meaningful way to weave consistent celebration and recognition into your organization’s culture. It signals to employees that their tenure and contributions are truly valued.

Please share your experiences, feedback, comments, or additional tips in the comments below. Let’s help each other make celebrating milestones both seamless and truly special! Thank you for reading this blog. Happy Learning!  🙂

entry.title: Multiple employments in Workzone, how do you handle user multiple employment user data?
entry.content:
Within SuccessFactors you can have multiple employments at the same time, this is typically for global assignment / international mobility use cases. This means both records are active at the same time, the user has one email address, etc. They are for our purposes the same user in WorkZone. 

WorkZone only has 1 profile for each user and then has an employment switcher in the top right when you have multiple employments, this essentially switches the active 'userId' when interacting with UI cards.

However, how do people handle access to workspaces based on employment data? Keeping the example simple is as follows:

Regardless of execution of the records, only one of them will fill in the country field. So, the answer I thought was simply using custom attributes! Do a check based on primary assignment, fill the address for Country A and custom attribute for Country B. However, WorkZone does not support PATCH requests so will delete data if not filled in.

So, how do others do it? How do you take employee data from 2 records and merge them into WorkZone using IPS? I can imagine how to do it using other tools, because you would GET all the existing data and just pass in the additional data. OR obviously PATCH requests would be excellent if supported and make this a non issue, but sadly they are not. 

What are others doing in this instace? Handling workspace assignments using something other than dynamic user lists? We've also used SF Permission Groups synced into WZ, however we hit a technical limit of groups (~100) so need to ideally use dynamic user lists/ something automatic not based on permission groups.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Power of Calibration in SAP SuccessFactors: A Strategic Guide for HR Leaders
entry.content: Thank you for the detailed guidance on Calibration—it was extremely helpful and much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: External cash desk - CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In

entry.title: Remote debugging for a TypeScript deployed app on BTP?
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to remotely debug a in TypeScript developed app on BTP? cf ssh is enabled and I can connect the debugger with cf ssh -N -L 9229:127.0.0.1:9229 myapp

But since source is compiled into .js and .js.map the breakpoints set in .ts files have no effect so do breakpoints in the .js files of the gen folder.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Change tax classification for substituted material su...
entry.content: hello, it is not a BOM, pure material determination used for a material substitution, the main material item is replaced with the same actually, there is one item category for the main item, which is without pricing and another item category for the sub-item which has pricing, the business wants to change the tax classification of the sub-item to be different from the main item so another tax percentage is applied during pricing

entry.title: Re: User-Centered Design & Development: The Role of User Research in Shaping SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Great piece!

Worth knowing if you are an SAP product user: SAP offers a centralized end-user recruitment program for user research, the SAP User Research Panel. Find out more and register now to participate in our remote user research studies!

https://www.sap.com/design/stories-resources/sap-user-research-panel

entry.title: Using DM Packing Unit as Handling Unit when posting Goods Receipt to EWM
entry.content:
Introduction

In EWM-integrated landscapes, SAP Digital Manufacturing can post Goods Receipts to SAP EWM upon Packing Unit closure. Learn more about it at Goods Receipt. In this blog post, I will cover a small trick that enables the usage of SAP Digital Manufacturing 'Packing Unit' as the 'Handling Unit' when posting Goods Receipt to EWM, increasing traceability between both systems.

Implementation

First, open Manage Collaboration Directives app, filter and select EWM_CONTAINER_CLOSE_CONFIRMATION directive, and set 'HU=PackingUnit' as a custom parameter.

Learn more at Manage Collaboration Directives, Customization section.

Then, set EWM_CONTAINER_CLOSE_CONFIRMATION directive for EWM_COLLABORATION_CONTAINER_CLOSE link and click 'Save'.

* Make sure you 'Save' the collaboration directive to collaboration link mapping above again, even if it was already in place before, to force update the new parameter set at the directive entry.

And that's it, your setup is ready!

Try it

Now, perform Packing as usual, via Packing List POD Plugin:

Finally, check Integration Message Dashboard app to see the EWM Goods Receipt messages posted, and note the before and after of adding the custom parameter. After adding the parameter, the Packing Unit ID should be sent in handlingUnitNumber field.

Before

After

So in EWM, you can perform putaway as usual and see the DM Packing Unit being used as the Handling Unit.

Increasing the traceability between both systems.

Learn more about Integration with EWM.

Conclusion

SAP Digital Manufacturing 'Packing Unit' can be used as Handling Unit during Goods Receipt posting to SAP EWM, increasing traceability between both systems.

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.
Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Not able to assign the access sequence to the Header condition type ZB01
entry.content:
We created a custom header condition ZB01 and when trying to assign the access sequence getting below error 

ERROR - An access sequence is not defined for the header condition
Message no. VT563

entry.title: UDM - Mass mapping of job locations in all existing job requisitions
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Is there a way to mass populate or map the Job Location field in all existing job requisitions through any import method or integration? We have created job locations data for using Unified Data Model in our RMK career site under generic Job Location Object . Unfortunately, the initiate migration job is not serving our needs, as it creates new job location entries and maps them to the requisitions, which is not our intended outcome.

We are specifically looking for assistance in mass importing job locations or mapping them to all job requisitions without creating new entries. If anyone has experience or knowledge in this area, your help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Remote debugging for a TypeScript deployed app on BTP?
entry.content:
Basically found the solution only minutes after I posted this question. The solution lays here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/remote-debugging-of-sap-capm-app-nodejs/ba-p/14118512

Login to subaccount and space, enable debugging with cf ssh myapp-srv and run cds debug myapp-srv and Chrome DevTools open up... voila.

Regards

that is mean the offline upload via Apps can't support the Variable order unit is 1 and 2? Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Trial balance report not showing BP filter and GL fil...
entry.content: sir, I have already checked the above, which you suggested. i repeat again, user is using limited finance license, and want to see the trial balance, where BP filter and GL filter not display on selection cirteria screen?

entry.title: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV Complete order
entry.content:
I created a purchase order in SAP using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV and have already delivered it. Now I want to complete the order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV.
To do this, I call the API as follows: 
HTTP-Methode ist 'Patch'
https://testfim.com:8443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseOrder('(6222222222')

The request for this is:
{
"PurchasingCompletenessStatus" : "true"
}

HTTP-Response: 
~status_code: 400
~status_reason Bad Request
Message: The data service request contains SystemQueryOptions that are not permitted for this request type.

Does anyone know how to complete an order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV API?
I would appreciate any help.

entry.content:
Hi Ahmed_Shaaban,

have you already solved this? I am currently facing the same problem.

BR Theresa

Hey @Sin2 , 

please contact paul.schropp@sap.com for any further details. Hope this helps!

Best regards,

Aletta

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2504 FD2
entry.content:
With the latest feature delivery (2504 FD2) for SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview.

Enhanced Transparency for Team Management

We’re pleased to announce a recent improvement to the Settings page. In an effort to increase transparency, we’ve introduced a new column to the Team table. This column will now display the e-mail addresses of the users assigned to the workspace, making it easier for you to manage and oversee your team members.

E-Mail column in the Team table

Optimized User Experience for Switching On Demo Data

We’ve enhanced the user experience for assigning deployment targets, giving the Assign Deployment Target dialog box a fresh new look. Depending on the system type, you may now have the option to easily switch demo data on or off up until scope confirmation. In addition, this action is logged as a dedicated entry in the Change Logs app to support audit requirements.

Demo Data column in the Assign Deployment Target dialog box

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2504 & FD2. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Did you like this blog? If so, please leave us a thumbs up at the top. Also, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have any ideas on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the Customer Influence platform to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Re: Seeking Architectural Guidance for a Generic Data Mai...
entry.content:
Hi Marian,

I am working with MS Copilot to investigate new topics and better formulate what I have in mind.
1. I started with a SAP Learning Journey
"Getting Started with Creating an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on an OData V4 RAP Service"
The second unit "Getting an Overview of ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" taught me that there is Boilerplate generator class available for RAP artifacts.
I checked my BW/4HANA development system. The generator class is not available.

2. Eclipse ADT version 2024-09
When I connect with BW/4HANA ABAP I don't see any generator function for RAP. Sure I could create the CDS data definition and other objects from scratch with eclipse.

3. SAP Github page with samples
Than I found https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap. Here I saw as requirement that only S/4 environments and BTP is listed explicitly. There is no single word/hint about BW/4HANA.

4. MS Copilot
I consulted LLM as you said. The only information here I got is that RAP is limited on BW/4HANA. Copilot does not find any web resource where I could get more details what kind of limitation.

5. Web search
I utilized Google. Still I could not find any information about the compatibility of RAP on BW/4HANA (on-premise) neither on SAP.com nor the Internet.

6. RAP on BW/4HANA (on-premise) vs RAP on BTP
Now I am asking who made this experience before. Is RAP on BW/4HANA (on-premise) against the information from Copilot fully supported. Or should I directly start with RAP on BTP because the support coverage, compatibility BW/4HANA and RAP is not enough.

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
UI5 Beginner

entry.title: Re: SAP Global Trade Management - Position management (SA...
entry.content:
Hi Kelly,

as Katharina has already explained everything I just want to add, that we have such requests from our customers and have therefore developed the Trading Contract Framework a software library which can create (also with reference to other Trading Contracts), change, delete and associate trading contract with each other. If you are interested please sent me a private message.

Best

Peter

entry.title: Re: Overall Budget control in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Keratiya.

You configure it in "Manage Your Solution", on "Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects" activity.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Change tax classification for substituted material su...
entry.content: You can think of adding item category to the access sequence for tax condition type, so that, as and when, the item category is changed in sale order, the required tax classification will be determined in sales order

entry.title: Is it safe to activate Business Function LOG_EAM_CI_7 in a production environment?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are planning to activate the Business Function LOG_EAM_CI_7 (Enterprise Asset Management Part 7) via standard configuration in SPRO.

Before proceeding, we would like to know if activating this Business Function in the production system — or in any environment — could potentially impact other existing processes or custom developments.

We are aware that once activated, this Business Function cannot be reversed, except by restoring a system snapshot or backup. Therefore, we are being extra cautious.

Does anyone have experience activating this BF? Are there any known issues, side effects, or dependencies we should be aware of?

Thanks in advance for your guidance and insights!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Empowering Your Homepage: Enabling My Home for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0
entry.content:
Hi Setu,

Thank you for the detailed blog. We’ve successfully activated the new My Home and are currently using the Export & Import functionality.

During testing, we noticed there appears to be some underlying logic governing the import process. For example:

  • If tiles/apps are imported without the necessary authorizations, those apps are skipped.

  • When importing tile variants (e.g., a list page with default search criteria), they are added under Favorite Apps rather than the Insight Tiles section.

  • If a tile/app exists in multiple groups under Favorite Apps, it seems to be imported only once.

While the import function displays a green flag indicating success, there’s no detailed logging or feedback—such as which apps weren’t imported due to missing roles or business catalogs.

Given these observations, I’m looking for a more detailed explanation or documentation outlining how the import functionality works.

Would you happen to have any reference material or documentation on this?

For context, we’re using S/4HANA 2023 FPS1.

Best regards,
Pieter

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenant CAP app with Fiori
entry.content:
Update: this is now resolved.

The Fiori app samples do not have the index.html file which the approuter is looking for by default. 

I have deleted these sample Fiori apps and created new ones. This is now working fine. We run into many other challenges in mta.yaml and approuter config if samples are not added.

entry.title: Re: Not able to assign the access sequence to the Header...
entry.content:
Hello @Surendra_Chitturpi 

Check the note 17217 - No access sequences for header conditions

...do not classify a condition as a header or item condition...

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

I am facing the issue that some details (Tax details) are getting deleted automatically in BP, general data, identification tab when we are extended the vendor to new company code in ECC.

entry.title: Re: Delivery Order Draft Query
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Search the ODBN table for batch numbers of a draft

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Roles in GRC returning from Production to Development...
entry.content:
Hi

This was handled with a parameter (3005) in older versions of GRC. Check https://me.sap.com/notes/0002422525

This now works giving you the option to reset or not the methodology if you use the Role Mass Maintenance only.

Once you choose the role and the owners to be updated you have the option to configure "reset methodology=NO" if you have your parameter 3005 configured.

Thanks

Diego

entry.title: Re: SAP Central Business Configuration – Blog Collection
entry.content: New blog alert − Check out our latest blog post: "What's New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2504 FD2"

entry.title: Re: Overall Performance Rating for Compensation Module -...
entry.content:
There is no source for my comment other than the 18 years of SuccessFactors experience I have.   What I will tell you is the number of PM templates has nothing to do with standard practice.   It is how you use each template.   It sounds like you are using separate PM templates for separate purposes which is common and within standards.   

As far as compensation, it is a standard practice to choose the appropriate PM template and link it to the compensation template and use the rating you choose as a basis of guidelines and recommendations.

if you are concerned about how ratings from the PM templates are stored, it is a question for the PM experts.

Thanks, David

entry.title: How to connect to SQL Anywhere database (v17.0.11.7908) running TLS1.3 with client connecting TLS1.2
entry.content:
We're moving a SQL Anywhere database to the Azure cloud. We've added additional security by adding a certificate using the -ec option in the database service.

We're able to connect from other Azure cloud machines using ODBC and the proper settings in the Security tab of the ODBC driver.

The customer also has SAP installed and uploads data in the database using SAP PI. SAP PI does not yet support TLS version 1.3 but support TLS version 1.2

The customer is not able to connect to the SQL Anywhere database from SAP PI when using JDBC. 
I thought the SQL Anywhere database would use the TLS version in the connection that was supplied by the client.

Is there a way in the JDBC driver to tell the server to switch to TLS version 1.2 for the given connection?
Do I maybe need to make a change in the SQL Anywhere database indicating that TLS version 1.2 is allowed?

entry.title: Credit exposure commitment type 500 is not updated when SD billing document is created for FWSD
entry.content:
As Transportation company we are using TM system where we are creating FWO orders and FWSD settlements document

When SD billing is created from FWSD document credit exposure with commitment type 100 (open orders) is updated correctly, so value of open orders decrease) but in the same moment value of open billing should increase, (comm.type 500) which is not happening.

Billing document value is not updated at all when billings are created for FWSD docuemnts

Is anybody observe similar issue

entry.title: Re: Compensation Story Report - Fields exported by Employees
entry.content: This is not a question for Compensation Management. It is question for the Analytics team.

entry.title: Re: Remove dms (PDF) in transaction CV02N. ERROR 26 035.

entry.title: Re: Roles in GRC returning from Production to Development...
entry.content:
Hello Diego,

unfortunately this only works in AC 10.0 and 10.1.

In AC 12.0 the parameter can be set to NO and will still be ignored.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Information Extraction (DOX) Service with camera
entry.content: Hi adeelshaikh, do you use a trial subaccount? The the URL in the destination should look like this: https://aiservices-trial-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/

entry.title: Re: Roles in GRC returning from Production to Development...
entry.content: This parameter also works in 12. you can check the help guide of GRC 12: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ACCESS_CONTROL/6c75bb80954e4543b4a4dfb68d6a4998/c03e3e90c45141d7bb870f15c0eb50d8.html

entry.title: Fiori "Page Unresponsive" Error Even Affects Home Page and Multiple Apps
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are facing an ongoing issue where Fiori becomes unresponsive and shows a “Page Unresponsive” error in the browser — even when only a single tab is open. This occurs not only within different Fiori applications but also on the Fiori Launchpad Home Page itself.
 
Clearing both the browser cache and Fiori frontend cache didn’t resolve the issue.
 
The problem appears on both Chrome and Edge browsers.
 
Backend system performance is stable — no CPU/memory bottlenecks, work processes are free.
 
No dump or error is registered in the backend (ST22, SM21, or Gateway error logs).
 
From the browser side, the tab freezes and we get the typical "Page Unresponsive" dialog.

Can you please help us on how to resolve this error?

Your help in this regard will be highly appreciated.

With regards,

Maryam

#SAP S/4HANA2022 

SAP Fiori Launchpad

entry.title: Re: Top menu toolbar is not clickable
entry.content: I'm using 8000.1.10.1161, patch level 10.

entry.title: Re: Roles in GRC returning from Production to Development...
entry.content: It works for not resetting the methodology, yes. But the role will still be set into the status Development.

entry.title: Re: Future Dated Hires Provisioning from SF EC/Onboarding to Azure AD / Onprem AD
entry.content: Hey @IC2 have you tried enabling this in the RBP... adding the "all (external Onboarding Users)" + "Status" from Employee data did the trick.

entry.title: Re: Roles in GRC returning from Production to Development...
entry.content: what I mean is that you can use the "mass maintenance" instead of the single rol maintenance to update the role owners. if you do so, your role won't get back to Development phase when changing the Role owners. As mentioned in the note this was previouly used in the "normal" single role maintwnance but removed afterward and only possible as part of the mass maintenance

entry.title: SAC Optimized Story Mode SortByValue Table
entry.content:
I am using a Checkboxgroup to adopted the Keyfigures in a Table (Material) AND a Chart (Branche). This works fine in Optimized Story Mode.

Now I want to sort the Values in the Chart and in the Table dynamically. 

The Code for the Chart (Branche) works fine. 

selectedMeasure = CheckboxGroup_Measures_2.getSelectedKey();
Branche.sortByValue(selectedMeasure,SortOrder.Ascending);

but the Code for the Table "Material" doesn't work. 

Material.sortByValue(selectedMeasure,SortOrder.Ascending);

Has anybody an idea how to adopt the Code? 
Many thanks and regards 🙏

entry.title: BlackLineサポートにSAP for Meで問い合わせをする適切な手順を教えてほしい

entry.title: Re: BlackLineサポートにSAP for Meで問い合わせをする適切な手順を教えてほしい

いつもお世話になっております。
Blackline license の有無によってBlackLineサポートにSAP for Meで問い合わせをする手順が異なります。

なお、詳細について記載されているKBAをお送りいたしますので、ご参考になれば幸いです。
3372268 - How to locate XX-PART-BKL* component in SAP For Me

もし上記内容について何かご不明な点がございましたら、お気軽にご返信ください。

どうぞよろしくお願い申し上げます。

SAPサポート
Judy

entry.title: Re: ADOBE Forms does not display custom field contents

entry.title: Re: Increase Alternative bank account number field S4HANA...
entry.content: Hello Customer We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Best Regards, Jahnavi

entry.title: Re: ADOBE Forms does not display custom field contents
entry.content: Hi wanglip0 The usage of this custom field is enable in both the user interface as well in the output data source. I also enabled it in the others ODATA services.

entry.title: Re: gCTS in S/4HANA Cloud 2502: “Could Not Verify Content...
entry.content:
Hi,
some general comments on this issue:

  • in Multi-Off, commits can only be pulled in an S/4HANA public cloud system, if they also had been pushed from an S/4HANA Public Cloud system - this applies to all commits in a repository (containing ABAP objects)
  • An upgrade of the systems does not 'destroy' the verification - in this case please open a case in component BC-CTS-GIT
  • If you pushed (accidentally) something to a repository from a non-S/4HANA public cloud system or created a commit on git directly, please refer also to the question 'When cloning a repository to a target system, I get an error message 'Content Versification failed' with 'Technical Detail: Code411x3: Commit verification for <repoID>failed' ' in the Troubleshooting on the SAP Help Portal. To fix this, you need to create a new commit and create a case on BC-CT-GIT to get your repository fixed.

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: ADOBE Forms does not display custom field contents
entry.content:
Hi Christian

I have to use SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM and SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEADER BADIs.

They are populating the custom fields as expected. After the sales order is created we can visualize the data in the custom fields tabs of the VA02 and VA03 forms.

This is the code in SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM

 

METHOD if_sd_sls_modify_item~modify_fields.

 

salesdocumentitem_extension_o = salesdocumentitem_extension_i.

 

" Impostos do detalhe

 

SELECT

SUM( case when c~conditiontype = 'BX41' then C~CONDITIONAMOUNT else 0 end ) AS RSD_ICMSST,

SUM( case when c~conditiontype = 'BX23' then C~CONDITIONAMOUNT else 0 end ) AS RSD_IPI,

SUM( case when c~conditiontype = 'BX13' then C~CONDITIONAMOUNT else 0 end ) AS RSD_ICMS

FROM

I_SALESDOCITEMPRICINGELEMENT WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS AS C

WHERE c~SalesDocument = @salesdocumentitem-salesdocument

AND c~SalesDocumentItem = @salesdocumentitem-salesdocumentitem

GROUP BY C~salesdocument, c~SalesDocumentItem

INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result1).

 

IF lt_result1 IS NOT INITIAL.

 

LOOP AT lt_result1 INTO DATA(ls_line1).

 

salesdocumentitem_extension_o-yy1_rsd_icms_sdi_sdi = ls_line1-rsd_icms.

salesdocumentitem_extension_o-yy1_rsd_ipi_sdi = ls_line1-rsd_ipi.

salesdocumentitem_extension_o-yy1_rsd_st_sdi = ls_line1-rsd_icmsst.

 

ENDLOOP.

 

ENDIF.

 

ENDMETHOD.

 

Let me know if there are mistakes on this code since we are new on ABAP


Regards,


Salim

entry.title: Re: SALES DOCUMENTS APPROVAL – STANDARD WORKFLOW
entry.content:
Hi Swetha,

Once question on the Approver user. Do we need to have the user created as business partner using HR integration or this app would work directly with the employee as business partner created without HR integration? Since we are not using SAP HR for employee master data I was told by SAP for "Sales price Approval Workflow" we need to set up the workflow by approver role and not by user id.

entry.title: Re: Is BI Support Tool supported on SAP BusinessObjects B...
entry.content: The URL is not functional anymore. Care to share the document number or the latest URL please?

entry.title: Set a default hierarchy
entry.content:
Let us assume to have a Datasphere Analytical Model where at least one field has "hierarchies with directory" hierarchy related. Let us assume to have all the required associations, in the Analytical Model, to have all these hierarchies available for selection.

My question is: is there a way to flag, one of these hierarchies as the default hierarchy? As far as I see, the default hierarchy is always the flat hierarchy. Nevertheless, my goal is to let the user to choose his own default hierarchy, in such a way that, when he opens the Analytical Model and select the field for the row or column section, the system already does the preselection on the defaulted hierarchy.

I hope to have been able to explain my doubt and what I am trying to do.

Thanks in advance for your help

Regards

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Issue with Availability/ATP despite confirmed qty in...
entry.content: From SD point of view, you should check in co09 instead of md04.  Please check in co09 whether unrestricted stock is available.

entry.title: Re: Overall Performance Rating for Compensation Module - Standard Process
entry.content: @DavidSomelofske: Many thanks for your comment and help! As you wrote "different purposes". We want to use the Overall Performance Rating, which is stored in the Talent Profile for Succession Management and Career Planning. Furthermore, we created a separate Performance-Template in order to have a separate Performance Rating (which is not stored in the Talent Profile) for Compensation Module. As both are Overall Performance Ratings, my questions would be if you would consider my described scenarios as 2 different purposes. - Many thanks

thanks

entry.title: Honored to be part of HCII 2025 in Gothenborg!
entry.content:
Every once in a while in a student's academic journey, a moment comes that transcends the usual grind, a milestone that marks a significant ascent in learning and achievement. Recently, I experienced such a moment: my thesis was accepted as a Poster Paper at the prestigious 27th International Conference on Human–Computer Interaction (HCII 2025) in Gothenburg, Sweden, held from June 22–27. Although I participated virtually, the experience was truly impactful.
Introduction to HCII 2025

The HCII conference is one of the leading global forums dedicated to Human–Computer Interaction, User Experience (UX), and interaction design. Its reputation for creating a dynamic space where researchers and practitioners from all over the world gather to exchange ideas and explore the latest trends is truly remarkable. Attending this conference was an exciting experience  for me, offering an unparalleled opportunity to engage with pioneers in the field.


My Thesis: A Brief Overview

Although I couldn't attend the conference in person, my mentor presented my paper on-site, for which I am very grateful. My thesis, titled "Manually and GPT-4 Created Feedback Questionnaires in Unmoderated Studies: A Comparative Case Study," examines the extent to which GPT-4 can support user researchers in creating questionnaires and evaluates the quality of the generated results. With this study, I hope to contribute to making the work of user researchers more efficient and increasing the use of AI in everyday work.

👉 If you’re interested, you can find the paper published in the HCII 2025 proceedings here:
https://lnkd.in/eBHZHfRb 


Immersing in the Conference: Highlights and Learnings

The opportunity to attend various online sessions at the HCII provided a wealth of knowledge. From presentations on the role of artificial intelligence in human-computer interaction (HCI) to innovative applications of AI, the conference offered a broad spectrum of insights. I found the session on Virtual Agents and UX Design for Personalized Health Support particularly interesting, as it addressed practical applications of virtual avatars. I was impressed by how many relevant and previously under-researched ideas exist, each of which would be worth pursuing in more detail.


Despite the challenges of virtual participation, the conference offered numerous opportunities to network with other conference attendees and researchers. For example, the community chat enabled intensive discussions on topics of mutual interest and encouraged the exchange of ideas. The Q&A sessions after each presentation also contributed to new perspectives and comprehensive insights into the topics. It's fascinating to see how many people are critically questioning things, actively considering complex topics, and showing interest in the future of human-computer interaction.

Reflection and Future Aspirations

Reflecting on this experience, I am deeply grateful to everyone who supported me throughout this journey. From mentors to peers, each played a vital role in helping me hone my ideas and present them effectively. Looking forward, I hope this achievement opens many doors for further learning, collaboration, and growth. 
In conclusion, participating in HCII 2025 was an unforgettable experience, marked by learning, networking, and the thrill of presenting my work to an esteemed audience. It serves as a valuable stepping stone in my academic career, inspiring me to continue exploring and innovating. I highly recommend everyone visit HCI if they get the chance. Whether as an exhibitor or a visitor, your perspective and horizons will be broadened.


Thank you to everyone who has supported me on this path. Here's to more exciting possibilities and transformative discoveries ahead! 🚀

entry.title: Re: Configure Relative Dates in Manage Route Maps for a 3...
entry.content: Thanks Jordi. The settings are enabled, however I'm not sure which of the drop-down options to choose within the map. For Example, do I choose X days After: form creation date, same step start date, previous step exit date, or previous step due date?

entry.title: Re: Down Payment at header level of a Sales Order
entry.content: Billing plan processing is item-level only in standard SAP SD. Header-level configuration of billing plan types is just a defaulting mechanism, not actual functionality. You must maintain billing plans and down payments at the item level, even if header-level billing plan settings are in place. Even with billing plan customization done at the header level, the down payment request and billing plan logic (like dates, milestones) must still be maintained at the item level. I hope this will help you. Don't hesitate to reply if you need further support. If you find my response useful, I kindly request you to award kudos as a small gesture. This motivates me to serve you better. Appreciate your feedback. Thanks, Divyesh

entry.title: Custom FIORI notification while (MIR7)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would like to receive a Fiori notification when an invoice is parked using transaction MIR7, without triggering any approval workflow.

Does anyone know the necessary configuration steps to achieve this?

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: Re: Is it safe to activate Business Function LOG_EAM_CI_7...
entry.content:
I always activate this type of Business Function (BF) in a sandbox system first, to analyse the impact (e.g. DDIC changes, FM and method signature changes) and to test it, before installing it in a development system.

If you value your sanity, I suggest you never start with a production system!

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning and Adoption Forum 2025 - Doku, Folien, Videos und mehr
entry.content: Ein herzliches Dankeschön an alle Teilgeber:innen, Teilnehmer:innen und das ganze SAP Team und dich Thomas für diese Summary - der ganze Content ist echt beeindruckend - DANKE!

entry.title: SAP B1 BY-PRODUCT
entry.content:
Hello,
In my SAP B1 version 9.3, I created a bill of materials (BOM) with a negative quantity declaration for the by-product.
My quantity process is correct and everything works fine. My problem is with the cost of my item; it doesn't include the cost of the by-product.
How can I get the cost of my pure product without the by-product charge?

Any idea?

Regards

#sapb1 #sapbusinessone #production

entry.title: Re: New Course Home : Launch Content in New TAB / New WINDOW effect on content communication
entry.content: Hi Karen, we have our content launch method set to launch in a new window because we were told that this was the best method to avoid launch errors. We'd prefer inline launching. Is this now improved?

entry.title: Re: ADOBE Forms does not display custom field contents
entry.content:
Hi @Salim-Satiro,
The implementation is the issue. You cannot select from I_SALESDOCITEMPRICINGELEMENT to get transactional data. If you select from a CDS View, you will always get the data from the database.

During creation of the sales order, there will be nothing on the database and therefore you will not get any data via CDS View.

In change mode of the sales order, you will only get the data from the database which could be outdated, as the data could have been changed.

The BAdIs are also called in display mode which could be confusing as it will show the right values, but they are not persisted.

That is also the reason why you cannot see any data in the Output.

Why do you need the values in custom fields? Are they not available in the output structure (PriceItemConditionNode / PriceTotalConditionNode)?

best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: 2820775 – Source of Information for Field in structur...
entry.content:
Bonjour,

Est-il possible également de recevoir ce fichier ?

Merci d'avance

Romain

entry.title: Re: The Future Has Been Written – the Rise of the Database Administrator
entry.content:
Hi There,

I’m reaching out to request assistance regarding a challenge I’m facing with the C_DBADM_2404 certification.

Unfortunately, I have attempted the exam three times and narrowly missed the passing score on two occasions, scoring 68% (with the pass mark being 69%). I understand that SAP policy limits candidates to three attempts per exam version, and as a result, I’m now blocked from retaking this certification until the next version is released.

However, I still have three exam attempts remaining on my subscription, which is valid until the end of August 2025. I’ve also invested heavily in study materials specifically for C_DBADM_2404 and was unaware of the three-attempt policy until I was blocked. This situation is deeply concerning for me, as obtaining this certification is essential for my current role, and my job is now at risk.

I’ve reached out to SAP Support requesting either a manual review of my last exam attempt or a possible additional attempt, but was informed that no exceptions can be made.

Given the urgency, I kindly ask:

  1. When is the next version (e.g., C_DBADM_2504) expected to be released?

  2. Is there any available alternative certification that closely matches the C_DBADM_2404 content where I could make use of my current preparation and remaining attempts?

Your advice and support would be greatly appreciated during this critical time.

entry.title: Re: BYD2405 Connection to HRMC
entry.content: Hi, I am currently trying to integrate SAP BYD with HMRC. I have scoped the solution and am now in the step where i need to enter authorization Code. Can I know which User ID and PW did you use? Did you use end user HMRC user id and PW? Your response will be of great help !

entry.title: Re: 2820775 – Source of Information for Field in structur...
entry.content:
You have to download the 3 files in a same directory, then open the zip one.

  • You require a S-id (proof be a Sap customer of partner) to open the note for legal reason.

entry.title: High Volume of data observed in table ADRV in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are on SAP S/4HANA Version 2020 on-premises. We have observed high volume of data in table ADRV. There are around 10 million records currently in ADRV out of which application table EKPO itself has 8.4 million records. Out of these 8 million records are present only for contracts.  Each contract line is registering nearly 5000 to 5500 records. We are aware that ADRV is like a where-used table for addresses. However, we see the number of records is very high in this table for EKPO. For TM activated POs, this table is accessed by the system during release process (Flexible Workflow through BADI) and the approval process is ending with error "Memory shortage". 

We have below queries:

 

1. Is this a normal situation for ADRV to have such a huge volume of data or is it a bug in SAP?

2. Also have anyone of you noticed that addresses of contracts lines are captured in ADRV in such a high volume. 

3. We want to know if anybody has come across this situation where the approval workflow is ending in error due to lack of system memory and if yes how have you overcome this in your environment?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best Regards,

Nithin Rao

entry.title: FSCM credit worklist for single BP.
entry.content: Usually credit worklist program executed whole credit segment which may have 1000's of BP and take long long time to finish. Is it possible to execute the program only for one BP?

entry.title: Service PO With Multiple Line Items Failing on SAP Business Network
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing issue while sending a service purchase order (containing multiple line items) to the supplier on SAP Business Network. The product is SAP Business Network Commerce Automation, Foundation Option.

The purchase order is created and successfully sent from SAP S/4HANA and reaches Managed Gateway (CIG) where it gets failed during conversion to cXML with the following error:

Please note that this is happening only in case of service PO with multiple line items and working fine for service PO with single line item, material PO with single as well as multiple line items.

 

Can anyone please guide what might be the root cause?

SAP Business Network for Suppliers  SAP digital supplier network membership  SAP digital supplier network membership for Supply Chain  SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network SAP Business Network for Logistics

entry.title: Preferential Origin – For externally procured configurable materials
entry.content:
We have a requirement wherein the client would like to understand how System determines the Preferential Origin for externally procured configurable materials. These materials should be treated similarly to other externally procured items — i.e., preferential origin should be determined based on supplier-provided documentation, such as a preferential origin certificate or LTSD.

Issue: Configurable materials-externally procured in Sales orders are not being transferred from ECC to GTS system.

Reason: Material BoM is not being maintained for plant 1000 Tcode- CS03, which causes BOM – Explosion issue.

If we check the table entries for BoM in the table MAST for plant 1000, we can see that system does not give any result (because BoM is not maintained for this product for Plant 1000 – in CS03).

Is there any way to achieve this requirement using Custom development especially if you have done it in your respective project??

Regards, Mayank

entry.title: Issue During Testing – Debugger Shows Blank Screen When Breakpoint is Reached
entry.content:
I give approval for SAP Support to use these Steps to Reproduce, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Need Partner Support? Here’s Who to Contact and How
entry.content:
Different ways SAP Partner Support can be reached.

Via Live chat or the Contact Form on the Partner Portal

Live Chat enables partners to reach the Partner Support Team in real time, ensuring faster responses and issue resolution for less complex queries.

Using our Partner Contact form ensures faster, more accurate support by capturing key details upfront, streamlining routing, and enabling better tracking for quicker resolution.

 

Log on to SAP Partner Portal | welcome and select 'Get help' on the bottom right hand side of the page where you will be able to select Live chat or the Contact form.

Site can also be accessed via https://partneredge.sap.com/en/public/get-help.html

Via SAP for Me

Partners can also easily access support through the Get Assistance section in their SAP for Me application, making SAP for Me the one stop shop for their partnership with SAP.

Contact the SAP Partner Support by using the "Get Support" on the partner "Get assistance" dashboard via SAP For ME.

Not Yet a Partner and interested in finding out more information – Please Contact Us here

Not able to log into Partner Edge – Please Contact Us here – (Please note to ensure to select “Partner” in relationship to SAP selection box.

This blog was written in collaboration with my colleague Kenny Laffey. 

Thanks for reading and hope you found it helpful! 

We hope you found this useful. Please note that the Customer Interaction Center is always happy to guide you on any of the mentioned processes and assist you with any queries you may have. 

If you have any questions, please post in the Q&A (Question & Answer) section here: All Questions in Customer Experience | SAP Community and All Questions in Support Services | SAP Community 

Read more #Customer Interaction Centre blogposts Here!

entry.title: Re: Seeking Architectural Guidance for a Generic Data Mai...
entry.content:
Hi Marian,

I asked AI to gave me a minimal RAP step by step example. I failed at step 3.
The Behavior Definition shows following error: "Empty Module #66"
The conclusion of AI is that SAP BW/4HANA 2023 even with the most recent support package has an old Netweaver version and therefore no ABAP Platform 2021 features. And with that BW/4HANA has no RAP stack at all.
My conclusion now is RAP on BW/4HANA (on-premise) is not limited, it is not working at all, if I could not get a Hello World program to work.

STEP 1: SE11 - Creating a simple table
@EndUserText.label : 'Hello World with RAP'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zhello_rap {

key mandt : abap.clnt not null;
key id : abap.numc(5) not null;
name : abap.char(40);
created_at : abap.dats;

}

STEP 2: Creating a CDS Data Definition
@EndUserText.label: 'Hello RAP View'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@ObjectModel.modelCategory: #BUSINESS_OBJECT
@ObjectModel.createEnabled: true
@ObjectModel.updateEnabled: true
@ObjectModel.deleteEnabled: true
define root view entity Z_I_HELLO_RAP as select from zhello_rap {
key id,
name,
created_at
}

STEP 3: Creating a CDS Behavior Definition
define behavior for Z_I_HELLO_RAP
persistent table zhello_rap
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
{
create;
update;
delete;
}

entry.title: Add Custom field with Custom fields app and enable the usage to SOAP API in S/4 HANA On-premise
entry.content:
Hi, 

I added custom fields for business context Sales: Sales Document and enabled the usage for service interface: sales order replicate A2A  operation: SalesOrderbulkreplication_OUT

Once it is published custom field is added in the SOAP API but with the different schema format <xsd: group ref > instead of <xsd:element name > ( for standard fields schema format ).
Why is it different that standard? 


Thanks

entry.title: Re: While printing a Form LOGO is missing for the new com...
entry.content:
Hello @Sanjay_BS1 

Thanks for the clarification. Since your voucher printing form is a custom template managed via Form Service by Adobe on SAP BTP, it’s not controlled by the Maintain Logos app in S4 Public Cloud.

To update the logo,

You need to embed the logo directly into the form layout

Then re-upload the updated form to Form Service by Adobe in BTP

The Maintain Logos app only applies to standard forms managed within the Public Cloud Output Management framework.

Let me know if you need help updating the form or accessing it in BTP.

Best regards,
Chuma,

entry.title: Re: Creating Mashup to Show SAP S/4HANA Addresses in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 for Utilities Add-o
entry.content:
Hi Steen,

Thank you for sharing this blog.

Could you please outline the steps required to generate a URL link for the HTML code provided, so that it can be updated in the "Create HTML Mashup" screen of Service Cloud V2?

Additionally, could you recommend the best application or method to generate such a URL link for HTML code?

entry.title: Make JobInfo Field Mandatory
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

There is a field in the Job Information section that also appears during the Add New Employee process in SF Employee Central. I need to make this field mandatory, as it is crucial for a subsequent integration job to function correctly. The field is of type string and uses a picklist.
I’ve updated the configuration in BCUI to set the field as mandatory, but this has had no effect — the field still lacks a red asterisk, and the system allows submission without it being filled in.
Could you please advise on how to properly enforce this requirement?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Re: 2820775 – Source of Information for Field in structur...
entry.content:
Bonjour,

quels fichiers je dois télécharger ?

et quel est le S-ID ? est ce celui de mon employeur ou lié aux environnement client SAP ?
